```go
package payments

import (
	"time"
)

type UUID = string

type Decimal string

type Currency string

type Provider string

const (
	ProviderStripe Provider = "stripe"
	ProviderPayPal Provider = "paypal"
	ProviderAdyen  Provider = "adyen"
)

type Status string

const (
	StatusOK       Status = "ok"
	StatusDeclined Status = "declined"
	StatusError    Status = "error"
)

type TransactionState string

const (
	StateReceived   TransactionState = "received"
	StateAuthorized TransactionState = "authorized"
	StateCaptured   TransactionState = "captured"
	StateDeclined   TransactionState = "declined"
)

type Transaction struct {
	ID             UUID
	Amount         Decimal
	Currency       Currency
	Provider       Provider
	IdempotencyKey UUID
}

type Receipt struct {
	ID            UUID
	TransactionID UUID
	Status        Status
	State         TransactionState
	Amount        Decimal
	Currency      Currency
	Provider      Provider
	CreatedAt     time.Time
}

type PaymentLog struct {
	TxID       UUID
	Status     Status
	ErrorCode  *string
	CreatedAt  time.Time
}

type PaymentService struct{}

func (s *PaymentService) AcceptTransaction(tx Transaction) (Receipt, error) {
	return Receipt{}, nil
}

func (s *PaymentService) LogResult(txID UUID, status Status, errorCode *string) error {
	return nil
}
```
